E

EARTH_WALL - Static variable in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.ModBlocks
Earth Wall Block.
EARTH_WAND - Static variable in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item.ModItems
Earth Wand.
EarthWallBlock - Class in com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.custom
Represents a temporary earth wall block that disappears after a short period of time.
EarthWallBlock(BlockBehaviour.Properties) - Constructor for class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.custom.EarthWallBlock
Constructs a new EarthWallBlock with the given block properties.
EarthWandItem - Class in com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item.custom
Represents a magical wand that allows the player to summon an EarthWallBlock.
EarthWandItem(Item.Properties) - Constructor for class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item.custom.EarthWandItem
Constructs a new EarthWandItem with the given item properties.
ENTITIES - Static variable in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.TGWands
Deferred register for entities under the mod namespace.
entityInside(BlockState, Level, BlockPos, Entity, InsideBlockEffectApplier) - Method in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.custom.WaterPrisonBlock
Called every tick when an entity is inside this block.
EXAMPLE_BLOCK - Static variable in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.TGWands
Example block for demonstration purposes.
EXAMPLE_BLOCK_ITEM - Static variable in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.TGWands
Example block item for demonstration purposes.
EXAMPLE_ITEM - Static variable in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.TGWands
